title: Implement full DAO-ACK MUST compliance and replay floor persistence in Zephyr RPL root
description: Add complete RFC2119 MUST checks for DAO-ACK handling, idempotent retransmission detection, and replay floor per sections 7.3 and 7.5 of draft-lichen-rpl-lora-00.md in lichen/subsys/lichen/rpl/routing.c and messages.c. Matches Rust impl. Reference project-LICHEN-et78.2
close_reason: Added MUST checks for DAO Origin Signature option (0x12), length validation, idempotent retransmission and replay floor per §§7.3/7.5 of draft-lichen-rpl-lora-00.md in routing.c and messages.c to match Rust impl
